title: A Mermaid Paradise Appears
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Fish-Men, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Narrator, Luffy, Nami, Sanji. The core story beat is a mermaid paradise appears.
scene: The scene centers on a mermaid paradise appears, with Unknown person #1, Fish-Men, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Narrator, Luffy, Nami, Sanji driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: You refuse to submit to the new fishman pirates...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Then it is decided! You are mere sinful humans...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why the heck have we gotta become your minions, huh?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy!! We probably shouldn't provoke them...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, this is a pity. We can't let you pass...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: The sunny is a lion, too!! We should settle this properly someday, sea lion!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Hang in there!! It's just until we reach fishman Island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's going on with that ship?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm coming, my beloved MER- mailiillids!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Aahhh!! We've lost our coating!!! That giant bubble just stripped it away!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's more, the bubble has two layers!! An ordinary ship would just sink upon reaching this air-filled stretch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's give it one final blast!!! Everybody hang on tight!!!

summary: A Mermaid Paradise Appears. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
